reason: The diff clearly implements the stated fix by adding X-Forwarded-* header resolution inside FetchState through the new `#applyForwardedHeaders()` method, which is called during FetchState initialization when `allowedDomains` is configured, and also creates `createRequestFromNodeRequest()` to skip duplicate header validation at the request creation stage, allowing user-provided fetch handlers to set these headers before FetchState picks them up.
